about.title: About Me
about.role: , <br style={{ display: 'none' }} /> Computer Engineer & Fullstack Developer.
about.p1_1: My focus is delivering robust and scalable web solutions. My specialty lies in combining the solidity of
about.p1_2: on the back-end with the interactivity of
about.p2: More than just completing tasks, my goal is to focus on solution engineering, applying Clean Code principles and agile methodologies to build high-performance and maintainable software.
about.p3: I currently develop critical systems at ECR Engenharia and also have experience in mobile development (Flutter/React Native).

list.name: TailTrack
list.description: TailTrack is a Full-Stack application developed to facilitate project management and activity tracking (involving a cute cat mascot! 🐱). The project is currently structured as a Monorepo.

list.name: ShiftSync
list.description: ShiftSync is a comprehensive system for tracking timesheets, generating reports, and managing team hours.

data.resumo: Fullstack Developer passionate about creating robust and scalable solutions, with solid experience in the .NET ecosystem. Specialist in modern architectures like DDD and Clean Architecture.

experiencia_profissional.descricao: Technical lead in the development of a specialized ERP for civil construction. Responsible for structural architecture improvements, migrating from pure ADO.NET to Dapper.
Strategic role focusing on Architecture and Cross-Cutting Concerns. Developed internal frameworks and high-traffic Restful APIs.
Performed UI, unit, and API testing on financial market applications.

destaques.descricao: Deep investigation of bottlenecks, refactoring, and extreme performance optimization.
Focus on value delivery and direct impact of features for the end user.
Vision beyond code, focusing on scalability, security, and sustainable design.
